visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A split-screen displays a hand on the left pouring cornflakes from a plastic bag into a metal bowl of clear water. On the right, a young woman with dark hair, red lipstick, and a floral pink blouse watches the process intently with an intrigued facial expression. The background is a brightly lit indoor room with posters. (2) The woman is shown in a medium close-up, eating the cereal and water mixture from a blue patterned bowl with a metal spoon. After taking a bite, she makes a disgusted face, pulling her lips back and squinting her eyes while shaking her head 'no' vigorously. (3) The scene shifts to a handheld walking shot across a tiled grey floor. The woman, now wearing a grey hoodie over her blouse, enters a CoCo bubble tea shop and points at a digital menu showing various orange and yellow drinks. She holds up a plastic cup of pearl milk tea. (4) Back indoors, the woman pours a large cup of light brown milk tea into a giant clear glass bowl. She then adds several containers of toppings, including orange taro balls, black grass jelly, and the remaining cereal. The bowl becomes filled with a dense, colorful mixture of liquids and solids. (5) She takes a large spoonful of the final mixture and eats it. Her eyes widen and she smiles broadly, showing extreme satisfaction. She gives a thumbs up to the camera while holding the CoCo drink cup next to the bowl, which is now being stirred with a blue and white spoon.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 美國爆紅吃法？ 玉米片加冷水. [Subtitle]: 美國網紅之間火紅 玉米片加冷水吃？. [Logo]: @HanHan. (2) [Variety]: 實驗歐膩. [Variety]: 真的嗎..... 진짜로?. (3) [Variety]: 好喝嗎？. [Subtitle]: 不可能.... (再試吃). [Subtitle]: 真的不行. (4) [Subtitle]: 想到更好的方法了！. (5) [Subtitle]: (走走走). 剛好有新品欸. (6) [Slogan]: 找到點！！！. [Subtitle]: 大家記得點「熱飲」喔！. (7) [Variety]: 珍珠爆多. [Subtitle]: 把冬韻擂焙珍奶通通倒進去！. (8) [Variety]: 完美. [Subtitle]: 差點忘記要加玉米片欸. 配料還有！ +小芋圓, 地瓜圓. +仙草. +剩下的玉米片. (9) [Subtitle]: 比加牛奶更好吃. 一定要加熱的冬韻擂焙珍奶...!. (10) [Slogan]: 冬日暖身必備. [Subtitle]: 現在冬韻擂焙珍奶還有2杯99元活動. 趕快前往CoCo吧~.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a pink floral blouse with white braided trim, occasionally seen wearing a grey zip-up hoodie.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A domestic indoor setting with white walls and colorful 'HAPPINESS IS HAPPENING' posters; transition to a commercial bubble tea shop counter with digital menus and branded signage.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a fast-paced, high-energy pop track featuring a bright synthesizer melody and a steady 4/4 electronic drum beat. A female speaker provides a high-arousal narration with a sharp pitch and frequent rising intonations. A 'pop' SFX marks the appearance of text. (2) As the speaker reacts to the cereal, a distinct 'wet crunch' sound is heard, followed by a slight dip in BGM volume to emphasize her vocal reaction. Her pitch drops to a lower, mocking tone to express her dislike of the water-cereal combo. (3) A loud 'whoosh' transition sound occurs as the scene changes to the street. Ambient traffic hum and the clatter of walking are briefly audible. The speaker's voice becomes more excited and faster as she discovers a new drink at the shop. (4) Multiple 'ding' and 'sparkle' sound effects are layered over the continuous BGM as different toppings are added to the bowl. The sound of liquid pouring is crisp and centrally panned. The vocal delivery is rhythmic, almost matching the tempo of the music. (5) In the final segment, slurping and chewing sounds are clearly emphasized. The speaker delivers a call-to-action with high dominance and a friendly, persuasive tone. The music concludes with a bright, ascending synthesizer flourish and a final resonant bell sound.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Problem -> Solution -> Reward -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote CoCo's new Lei Cha pearl milk tea by contrasting it with a viral, unpleasant internet food trend (cereal in water) and demonstrating a delicious alternative using CoCo's product.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of CoCo branding, specific product name '冬韻擂焙珍奶', and mention of a '2 for 99' promotion.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-quality social media marketing video using 'hook' strategy and fast editing to keep viewers engaged.
